paragraphs: I'm a software developer based in Sydney, currently working at the University of Technology Sydney within an R&D innovative department called Rapido.

My strengths lie in full-stack web development, frontend UX design, and Linux-based software development — spanning everything from low-level systems work to hands-on hardware installation and maintenance. I bring AI integration into projects where it adds real value — making systems more intelligent and workflows more efficient.
I thrive at the boundary between systems engineering and product delivery, often stepping into technical leadership when projects need direction.
